mapper.select: SELECT a.*, r.real_name as staff_name, s.year_month, s.change_reason FROM salary_appeal a LEFT JOIN retired_staff r ON a.staff_id = r.staff_id LEFT JOIN salary_record s ON a.salary_id = s.salary_id WHERE a.staff_id = #{staffId} ORDER BY a.appeal_id DESC

SELECT a.*, r.real_name as staff_name, s.year_month, s.change_reason FROM salary_appeal a LEFT JOIN retired_staff r ON a.staff_id = r.staff_id LEFT JOIN salary_record s ON a.salary_id = s.salary_id ORDER BY a.appeal_id DESC

SELECT a.*, r.real_name as staff_name, s.year_month, s.change_reason FROM salary_appeal a LEFT JOIN retired_staff r ON a.staff_id = r.staff_id LEFT JOIN salary_record s ON a.salary_id = s.salary_id WHERE a.appeal_id = #{appealId}

SELECT a.*, r.real_name as staff_name, s.year_month, s.change_reason FROM salary_appeal a LEFT JOIN retired_staff r ON a.staff_id = r.staff_id LEFT JOIN salary_record s ON a.salary_id = s.salary_id WHERE a.salary_id = #{salaryId} AND a.staff_id = #{staffId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_appeal (salary_id, staff_id, reason, reply, status) VALUES (#{salaryId}, #{staffId}, #{reason}, #{reply}, #{status})
